title: senecio lingianus
intro: Senecio lingianus, also known as the Alpine Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. Traditionally, Senecio lingianus has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which aid in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. Senecio lingianus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to promote respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
